rulings.Case Title: BORREGAS COURT ASSOCIATES, A CALIFORNIA GENERAL VS. BOSTON FINANCIAL INVESTMENT MANAGEMENT A ET AL

rulings.Case Title: CHOO KOON NG VS. DAMIEN QUINN ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Response To Form Interrogatories And Demand For Inspection And Production Of Documents And Motion For Order That Requests For Admission Be Deemed Admitted And Request For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 10, 2018 line 3. PLAINTIFF CHOO NG's Motion To Compel Response To Form Interrogatories And Demand For Inspection And Production Of Documents And Motion For Order That Requests For Admission Be Deemed Admitted And Request For Sanctions OFF CALENDAR, insufficient notice per CCP 1005 and CCP 1013. Motion filed and served by mail on September 18, 2018; calendared for October 10, 2018. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: RALPH PARTNERS II, LLC VS. YI DUN FANG WEI ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, UNLAWFUL DETAINER
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 10, 2018 line 4. PLAINTIFF RALPH PARTNERS II, LLC's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, UNLAWFUL DETAINER GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. Motion is GRANTED, subject to opposition as to Defendant Yi Dun Fang Wei, former owner of the property and trustor under the foreclosed Deed of Trust. Motion is DENIED as to Deprospero and Sokoloff. Moving party failed to shift its burden as establish that it is entitled to a judgment as a matter of law as against these defendants, i.e. that no Federal, State or Local tenant protections apply to them. No authority is cited for a proposition that under the facts of this case Deprospero and Sokoloff are not tenants. (A magazine/journal article is not legal authority). Additionally, had the burden been shifted, Deprospero and Sokoloff created a triable issue of fact regarding their status as tenants. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: JING ZHANG ET AL VS. TRINIDAD M. GWIN ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 10, 2018 line 5. DEFENDANTs TRINIDAD GWIN and FRANCES JOHNSTON's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Complaint states sufficient facts to state a cause of action for unlawful detainer and is not uncertain. Notice is not fatally defective and procedures required by SFRO and Ellis Act have been complained with under any standard of compliance. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: JING ZHANG ET AL VS. TRINIDAD M. GWIN ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Reclassify
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 10, 2018 line 5. DEFENDANTs TRINIDAD GWIN and FRANCES JOHNSTON's Motion To Reclassify DENIED. No showing has been made that there is no possibility of jurisdictionally appropriate verdict or that recovery will necessarily be not with the unlimited jurisdiction. See Walker v. Sup. Ct. (1991) 53 Cal.3d 257; Ytuarte v. Sup. Ct. (2005) 129 Cal.App.4th 266. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. VS. ROBERTA D. ALVAREZ ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 10, 2018 line 6. DEFENDANTs LUIS SANCHEZ, MARIA NAVARRO, MARINA NAVARRO, and CLAUDIA SANCHEZ's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Complaint sufficiently asserts a cause of action. Defendants generally appeared in this action by filing a demurrer and substantively addressing the merits of the case. Any issues of fact, not appearing on the face of the complaint, cannot be raised on a demurrer. Defendants are ordered to comply with service requirements. All future filings to be properly served. Plaintiff is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.7B and provide courtesy copies of their filings to department 501. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: SAU KING CHAN VS. ANN MARIE GARVEY ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 10, 2018 line 9. rulings.Case Title: SAU KING CHAN VS. YAOHUI PENG ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 10, 2018 line 10. DEFENDANTs YAOHUI PENG and JUNJIE PENG's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT SUSTAINED with leave to amend for Plaintiff to allege in good faith that form 1007 has been served and to attach a legible copy of the operative notice (including form 1007). = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: GUOKUN HUANG VS. YONG ZHAO ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 10, 2018 line 11. DEFENDANTs YONG ZHAO and CHUN SHU's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT SUSTAINED without leave to amend. Notice is fatally defective. Expiration of the Notice is an element of the unlawful detainer action. Notice fails to specify the expiration date, rendering it impossible for tenants to comply with the notice or for plaintiff to prove that notice has not been complied with. Additionally, notice fails to properly advise the tenants of their right to re-rent. Incomplete information is provided. = (501/CFH)
